What TackPath does

It orchestrates your entire delivery operation.

TackPath connects every piece of a delivery operation into a single intelligent system. When an order comes in, TackPath prices it, routes it, assigns the right driver, tracks every mile, handles unexpected issues, and closes the signal with a captured signature. It does this continuously, across your entire fleet, without manual intervention.

Dispatchers get full visibility and override capability when they need it. Drivers get clear assignments and live routing. Customers get real-time updates. The operation runs itself.

The Platform

Four systems.
Built to work as one.

Every component was designed together. They share the same data, the same signal, and the same clock.

Delivery Signal

The heartbeat of every order. The moment a customer submits a delivery, TackPath creates a live, trackable Signal that flows through every system from pickup to proof of delivery.

Instant order creation from customer or dispatcher
Real-time status across both portals simultaneously
Automatic pricing, quotes, and margin tracking
Full audit trail from signal to signature
SmartPath

AI-powered route optimization that doesn't stop at the first calculation. SmartPath watches traffic, driver positions, and SLAs. It recalculates in real time and adjusts when conditions change.

Live route recalculation based on real conditions
AI reasoning log showing exactly why each route was chosen
Driver proximity matching and load balancing
Automatic reroute on traffic or incidents
SmartTrack

Real-time GPS telemetry for every driver in your fleet. Customers see their driver moving. Dispatchers see the full picture. Geofence triggers fire automatic notifications at pickup, in transit, and at delivery.

Live fleet map with all drivers, all signals, real time
Geofence triggers at pickup, transit, and delivery
Automatic customer ETA updates and push notifications
Driver telemetry — speed, position, idle status
Command Center

The operations brain. Command Center gives dispatchers complete visibility and override capability. Reassign drivers, adjust routes, push customer notifications, escalate signals, and manage SLAs from one real-time dashboard. When SmartPath handles something automatically, Command Center logs why. When a human decision is needed, Command Center surfaces it immediately.

Auto-Dispatch
Exception Queue
SLA Tracker
Driver Leaderboard
Revenue Analytics
Ops AI Intelligence
How it works

Signal to signature.
Fully autonomous.

01
Customer places an order
A Delivery Signal is created instantly from the TackPath customer portal or the OPS dispatch dashboard. A quote is generated automatically based on distance, priority tier, and time of day.
02
Customer confirms. SmartPath routes.
The customer confirms the quote with one tap. Simultaneously, SmartPath calculates the optimal route, factoring live traffic, driver positions, load balance, and delivery window. Every routing decision is logged with full AI reasoning.
03
Driver auto-assigned in seconds
SmartPath selects the best available driver based on proximity, current load, and SLA tier. Assignment is automatic. Dispatchers retain full override at any point through Command Center.
04
SmartTrack goes live
The moment the driver moves, SmartTrack activates. The customer sees their driver on the map. OPS sees the full fleet. Geofences fire automatic notifications at each stage.
05
Exceptions handled automatically
When a traffic incident hits, SmartPath reroutes. When a driver falls behind, the customer is notified and the exception is flagged before a dispatcher has to act. Every exception is categorized, actioned, and logged.
✓
Delivered. Archived. Invoiced.
Recipient signature captured digitally. Signal archived. Invoice generated automatically. Revenue and margin are tracked in real time on the Analytics dashboard.

Who TackPath serves

Built for the
people who deliver.

TackPath is for courier companies that are serious about growth. Not another tool to manage. A system that runs the operation.

01
Independent Courier Companies
Small to mid-size operations competing against the giants. TackPath gives you enterprise-grade dispatch, routing, and tracking without an enterprise IT budget. Level the playing field.
02
Medical & Pharmaceutical Delivery
When timing is critical. TackPath's priority tiers, SLA tracking, and exception escalation were built for operations where on-time performance is not optional.
03
Fleet Managers & Dispatchers
The people running the show. TackPath's Command Center gives dispatchers full visibility and override capability while SmartPath handles routine decisions automatically. Fewer calls. Better outcomes.
A managed service by TackPath

Don't run the platform.
Hand us the operation.

For couriers who would rather drive their business than staff a dispatch desk, Symphony+ is a Logistics Operations Center. Our operators run your fleet end to end on the TackPath platform: order intake, SmartPath pricing and dispatch, live tracking, customer communication, exception recovery, and billing. You connect once. We take the floor.

Symphony+
A staffed ops floor
Trained operators monitor every fleet on the board so you never have to sit at a screen.
Transparent dispatch
Every order priced, every driver assigned with a reason, every route built in full view.
Exceptions handled
Traffic, offline drivers, slipping windows. Caught, recovered, and communicated before it costs you a customer.
One flat monthly fee
A professional operations center for fleets too small to staff their own. It scales when you do.
